productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Adi Taurus White Shoe
description: With style and comfort rolled into one, the adidas Taurus makes for a perfect soccer cleat for the player who wins in style. Lightweight and fashionable, the Taurus is that to-die-for soccer shoe. Team it with performance clothing when hitting the field, or simply pair it with jeans and tees for a cool, casual look.UpperSynthetic upper with perforations on the toe box for maximum breathabilityadidas three patent stripes to add to the upper structure signifying the challenges ahead and goals that can be achievedMesh tongue with mesh lined collar for snug FitGilly central offering maximum comfort and to lock the foot in placeMidsoleCushioned footbed for impact protection and all-day comfortInjected EVA for long term lightweight cushioningScooped midsole for maximum traction and to reduce impact to the inner archOutsoleCarbon rubber outsole with circular lugs below the forefoot and ridges below the heel cupToe guard for longer shoe life and protection to the forefootMulti-directional textured outsole for superior grip and maximum tractionShoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
